title: Chamaeiris urumovii
taxonomy: Chamaeiris urumovii is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae. It is native to South Asia and belongs to the genus Chamaeiris. The classification of Chamaeiris urumovii is as follows: kingdom Plantae, clade Angiosperms, clade Eudicots, clade Rosids, order Sapindales, family Sapindaceae, genus Chamaeiris, species C. urumovii. This species is closely related to other plants in the Sapindaceae family, such as the Indian copper pod. Chamaeiris urumovii is an important part of the ecosystem in its native region.
